summary: Completed frontend testing for Admin Panel Modernization. All features working correctly: Admin Dashboard with stats cards, modern sidebar with categorized menu, Site Settings (5 tabs), SEO Management (4 tabs), Content Management (5 pages x 5 languages), and Partner Dashboard with modern layout.
critical_code_review_comments: AdminLayout.js correctly implements modern sidebar with categorized menu (GENEL, İÇERİK YÖNETİMİ, KULLANICILAR, KATALOG, SİSTEM)
AdminDashboard.js has proper data-testid attributes for stats cards (main-stat-0 to main-stat-3)
AdminSiteSettings.js implements 5 tabs (General, Branding, Social, Features, Homepage) with proper form controls
AdminSEO.js implements 4 tabs (Global SEO, Page SEO, Robots, Analytics) with meta inputs and switches
AdminContent.js implements page selector (5 pages) and language selector (5 languages) with editable content fields
DashboardLayout.js has modern user card with stats (Görüntüleme, Favori, Mesaj) and proper menu items
All admin routes properly protected with ProtectedRoute component checking for 'admin' role
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin panel modernization complete. All features tested: 1) Admin Dashboard with 4 main stats cards and 4 secondary stats, quick actions, system status. 2) Modern sidebar with 14 menu items in 5 categories. 3) Site Settings with 5 tabs (General, Branding, Social, Features, Homepage). 4) SEO Management with 4 tabs (Global SEO, Page SEO, Robots, Analytics). 5) Content Management with 5 pages (Ana Sayfa, Hakkımızda, İletişim, SSS, Footer) and 5 languages (TR, EN, RU, DE, EL). 6) Partner Dashboard with modern user card and stats.

admin_dashboard.stats_cards: PASS - 4 main stats (Toplam Kullanıcı, Aktif Partner, Onay Bekleyen, Toplam Gelir)
admin_dashboard.secondary_stats: PASS - 4 secondary stats (Aktif İlanlar, Vitrin İlanlar, Toplam Mesaj, Sayfa Görüntüleme)
admin_dashboard.quick_actions: PASS - 4 quick action buttons (Profil Onayları, Site Ayarları, SEO Yönetimi, İçerik Düzenleme)
admin_dashboard.system_status: PASS - 4 status indicators (Veritabanı, Dosya Depolama, SMS Servisi, Ödeme Sistemi)

admin_sidebar.categorized_menu: PASS - 5 categories (GENEL, İÇERİK YÖNETİMİ, KULLANICILAR, KATALOG, SİSTEM)
admin_sidebar.menu_items: PASS - 14 menu items with proper navigation
admin_sidebar.navigation_test: PASS - All 8 tested menu items navigate correctly
admin_sidebar.user_info: PASS - Admin name and Administrator role displayed

site_settings.general_tab: PASS - Site name, tagline, contact info, regional settings, site status
site_settings.branding_tab: PASS - Logo/Favicon URLs, 3 color pickers with preview
site_settings.social_tab: PASS - Facebook, Instagram, Twitter, Telegram inputs
site_settings.features_tab: PASS - 7 toggle switches for platform features
site_settings.homepage_tab: PASS - Hero text fields, section toggles, partners per section

seo_management.global_seo_tab: PASS - Site title (60 char), description (160 char), keywords, OG image, Twitter handle
seo_management.page_seo_tab: PASS - Page selector dropdown, per-page title/description/keywords
seo_management.robots_tab: PASS - 2 toggle switches (indexing, following), sitemap URL, custom rules
seo_management.analytics_tab: PASS - Google Analytics, Search Console, Facebook Pixel, structured data

content_management.page_selector: PASS - 5 pages (Ana Sayfa, Hakkımızda, İletişim, SSS, Footer)
content_management.language_selector: PASS - 5 languages (TR, EN, RU, DE, EL) with flags
content_management.hero_fields: PASS - Editable hero title, subtitle, description, CTA buttons
content_management.faq_management: PASS - Add/remove FAQ items with question/answer fields

partner_dashboard.user_card: PASS - Avatar, name, Partner badge, stats (Görüntüleme, Favori, Mesaj)
partner_dashboard.menu_items: PASS - 5 menu items (Dashboard, Profilim, Fotoğraflar, Premium, Mesajlar)
partner_dashboard.bottom_actions: PASS - Siteyi Görüntüle, Çıkış Yap buttons

mocked_apis_note: Admin settings save endpoints (/api/admin/settings/*, /api/admin/seo/*, /api/admin/content/*) may not persist data yet - MOCKED
